历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 10217 → 9881 → 8194 → 7584 → 9493. After a significant advance to 8194 in 2023, it continued to advance to 7584 in 2024, but notably retreated to 9493 in 2025, a retreat of about 1909 places in the last year, indicating large fluctuations. The university's science enrollment plan in Shaanxi was 49 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 53 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 66, an expansion of about 24.5% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science University Rankings, it ranked 50th in 2021 → 53rd in 2022 → 49th in 2023 → 45th in 2024 → 43rd in 2025 → 43rd in 2026, showing a continuous and steady rise, with the university's comprehensive strength and recognition increasing year by year. No negative events were separately listed for the university in the 2026 reputation evaluation. It ranks 27th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.72 million. The main content spread includes characteristic ace majors such as underwater acoustic engineering and nuclear engineering, as well as the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' label, indicating high application attention. No obvious records of admission cut-off breaks were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, control science and engineering is an A (the only A-class discipline), and ship and ocean engineering, underwater acoustic engineering, nuclear engineering and nuclear technology are industry-specific advantageous directions. Corresponding enrollment majors include ocean engineering, underwater acoustic engineering, nuclear engineering and nuclear technology, which have strong appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the university's engineering advantages. The number of physics category candidates in this province was about 172,000 in 2025 → about 207,000 in 2026, an increase of about 19.7%, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in; however, northeastern universities generally have average regional preference among Shaanxi candidates, which may have a certain downward pull on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant retreat in rankings in 2025, the easing effect of a planned enrollment expansion of about 24.5% in 2026, the intensified competition from a 19.7% increase in physics category candidates in the province, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and high Douyin popularity, a limited adjustment is made considering the positive impact of candidate growth and reputation popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be about 10740, with a range of 10240–11240.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10240), focus on reaching for Tier 1 ace majors. The university is characterized by 'Three Seas and One Nuclear', and related majors have good employment prospects.
